rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that antipode_convMul_id is used only once internally and should be private, which cleans up the namespace — a real, verifiable placement fix. Review 2's demand to split a coherent 200-line FunctorOfPoints file into separate Bialgebra and HopfAlgebra folders would scatter tightly coupled algebraic-group code from its application context, making the PR organization worse.
